nasb.text: Let the food become as a reserve for the land for the seven years of famine which will occur in the land of Egypt, so that the land will not perish during the famine.”

esv.text: That food shall be a reserve for the land against the seven years of famine that are to occur in the land of Egypt, so that the land may not perish through the famine.”

cnv.text: 這些糧食要儲存起來，可以應付將來埃及地的七年饑荒，免得這地被饑荒所滅。”

ccb.text: 这些粮食要留到七年饥荒时用，免得这片土地被饥荒毁灭。”

csbs.text: 这些粮食是为了将临到埃及地的七个荒年而储备的，免得这地被饥荒所灭。”
